homeTitle: Baltimore Tours | Self-Guided Baltimore Story Routes Preview
homeDescription: Explore draft Baltimore walking tours for Pennsylvania Avenue Black Arts and Harbor Labor & Freedom with live script narration, maps, and Compass guidance.
catalogDescription: Browse the draft Baltimore city pack with routes for Pennsylvania Avenue Black Arts, harbor labor, freedom stories, and neighborhood memory.
homePanelTitle: The second city is now real enough to walk and review.
homePanelBody: Baltimore is the first non-Philly city pack in the platform. This draft release now includes two researched routes with real landmarks, live script narration, and enough structure to pressure-test the same codebase outside Philadelphia while the remaining launch tours are still being built.
